issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' (optional response to opponent's attack), not 'OnAttacked' (automatic when this card is attacked)
Missing condition to filter target by {Fish-Man} type. Target should include type filter.
Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' (effect lasts during opponent's turn), not 'EndOfTurn'. Text explicitly states 'during this turn' in context of opponent's attack phase.
Missing cost requirement: This Character must rest as a cost to activate the effect. Should include a cost action or cost specification.
